rationale: Diff contains only this attempt's own execution evidence (manifest.json, result.json). No code changes implement prompt_sha in manifest output, and no size-report fixture exists. The shown manifest.json itself lacks a prompt_sha field, contradicting AC7.

findings.summary: manifest.json in the diff has no prompt_sha field; AC7 requires every attempt's manifest to include it
No source changes to manifest writer (e.g., cli/internal/agent/...) shown — prompt_sha is not actually being computed or emitted
No render-size test fixture / CI artifact wiring present in the diff
